Brazil Age Verification
JustThatKing
Site News
Hi everyone. We wanted to share an important update about how adult content will be handled for our community in Brazil. In September last year, the Brazilian government passed the Digital ECA (Digital Child and Adolescent Statute), a law that requires digital platforms that minors can access to use reliable and auditable age-verification systems for adult content. To make sure Nexus Mods stays available and compliant in Brazil before the law comes into force tomorrow (17th March 2026), we’ll...
